meta.description: Docebo Marketing Brain — crawl-stage knowledge graph for Campaign Builder Agent

personas.title: VP of Learning & Development
objections: We already have a learning platform
Our IT team needs to approve new tools
We don't have budget for another AI tool
Our team is too small to manage another system

personas.title: Chief People Officer
motivations: connect learning to retention and performance
show board that people investment is working
objections: We need data before we invest
Show me how this ties to retention
Our managers won't adopt another tool

personas.title: L&D Program Manager
objections: I don't have time to learn a new system
I need something I can use today

pains.label: Administrative Overload
pains.description: L&D teams spending 60-70% of their time on manual tasks — content curation, enrollment, reporting — instead of strategic program design
customer_quotes: The setup process can be pretty tedious — even simple admin tasks end up taking way more steps than they should
I don't have time to learn more and get more out of the system
It's a pain when I just need a quick view of where everyone's at without jumping through hoops
Legacy pages are very clunky and make the admin job tedious
I wish I could duplicate learning plans like you can courses — it would be a time saver
pains.docebo_solution: AgentHub automates content curation, learner routing, and enrollment so L&D teams operate at 10x output without adding headcount
pains.stat: Up to 80% decrease in administrative costs reported by Docebo customers

pains.label: Cannot Prove Learning ROI
pains.description: Learning leaders cannot connect training activity to business outcomes — retention, performance, revenue — so L&D is seen as a cost center not a strategic function
customer_quotes: The reporting and tracking features are particularly helpful for monitoring progress and measuring learning outcomes
Docebo Learning Analytics is really great for measuring the business impact of our learning journey
pains.docebo_solution: Advanced Analytics correlates learning data with HR, CRM, and finance data to prove learning ROI to the CFO and board
pains.stat: 59% of best-performing organizations integrate skills into L&D delivery vs 36% of everyone else — RedThread Research

pains.label: Cannot Personalize at Scale
pains.description: L&D teams are expected to deliver personalized learning paths to hundreds of employees but are running manual one-size-fits-all programs
customer_quotes: 79% of employees say the learning they received is not fully personalized
63% of learning leaders agree they are falling short on delivering personalized learning
pains.docebo_solution: AgentHub delivers individualized learning paths automatically — skills gaps trigger targeted paths without manual assignment
pains.stat: 79% of employees say learning is not personalized to them — Docebo AI Readiness Gap Report 2026

pains.label: No Real-Time Skills Picture
pains.description: Organizations cannot see their workforce capability in real time — skills data is static spreadsheets not a dynamic map tied to learning
customer_quotes: We need a better manager dashboard where supervisors can see what employees are overdue in training
pains.docebo_solution: Skills Intelligence surfaces roles, proficiencies, and inferred skills across the workforce — a real, dynamic picture updated continuously
pains.stat: Skills gaps trigger targeted learning paths — the Detect, Grow, Validate loop

pains.label: Workforce Not AI-Ready
pains.description: 85% of employees say training does not help them use AI in their role — organizations have deployed AI tools but employees cannot use them
customer_quotes: 85% of employees say the training they receive does not help them use AI in their role
1 in 5 employees have not received any AI training at all
Only 9% of organizations have used AI to fully redefine their workflows
pains.docebo_solution: AgentHub delivers AI literacy learning paths personalized to role — employees learn AI in the flow of work not in a classroom
pains.stat: AI literacy is the #1 priority for both employees and learning leaders over the next 12-18 months — Docebo 2026 report

pains.label: Content Creation Takes Too Long
pains.description: Creating course content is slow — L&D teams spend weeks producing materials that could be generated in hours with AI
customer_quotes: One-off knowledge becomes a course. A scattered wiki becomes a skills campaign. A product release note becomes an interactive podcast
pains.docebo_solution: Content Creator + AgentHub generates course outlines, assessments, and media plans from existing documents — Drive, Confluence, SharePoint, Docebo catalog

products.name: Docebo AgentHub
products.availability: Coming Fall 2026 — announced at Docebo Inspire April 2026, not yet live
products.tagline: Agents that don't just assist, they do the work
products.positioning: Build custom AI agents that know your company. AgentHub connects your systems, skills data, and learning content, putting it all to work on what actually matters: your people.
products.key_differentiator: Generic AI gives generic answers. AgentHub acts on what your organization actually knows — connected to everything you already run on. Not a separate product. Built into Docebo.
products.connectors: 20+ enterprise connectors including Confluence, SharePoint, Google Drive, Salesforce, Slack, 365Talents skills profiles, Docebo learning data
products.security: Permission-aware, full audit trails, role-based access controls, ISO 27001, SOC 1+2, GDPR, CCPA certified. Docebo never trains a model on your data.
use_cases: Compliance Triage — review overdue compliance, send personalized reminders automatically
Skill Gap Scout — analyze role profiles, flag missing skills against learning completion
Quiz Maker — turn any document or URL into a ready-to-publish assessment in minutes
Career Path Builder — map employee skills to internal roles, recommend learning journey
Onboarding Architect — generate 30-60-90 day learning plan for new hire role and location
Launch Announcer — draft and send multi-channel comms plan for any new learning program
Enrollment Detective — find learners who started but never finished, send re-engagement
SME Interviewer — turn 20-minute SME transcript into structured course outline
proof_points: 20+ enterprise connectors out of the box — no integration backlog
24/7 autonomous operation — agents run on schedule without human intervention
Zero lines of code — if you can describe a workflow, you can build an agent
Full audit trail for every agent action — enterprise governance built in
products.campaign_motion: Existing Docebo LMS customers only — early access and waitlist pipeline for Fall 2026 launch. These are warm accounts who trust the platform. Campaign goals must be early access sign-ups or waitlist demo requests, never standard product demos. Frame as exclusive early access for existing customers.
products.timing: pre-launch pipeline build — product available Fall 2026

subject_lines: Your L&D team is spending 60% of their time on admin. AgentHub is built to fix that.
The compliance reminder your team sends every week — what if an agent did it for you?
First agent, one afternoon, no IT ticket.
vp_ld.hook: Most L&D teams know exactly which tasks eat their week. The problem isn't identifying them — it's that no one has given you a way to automate them without a developer.

subject_lines: 85% of your employees say training doesn't help them use AI. Here's what's different.
Your AI tools are deployed. Your people aren't ready to use them — yet.
AI literacy can't be a one-time course. Here's how the fastest-moving organizations are fixing that.
cpo.hook: Your organization has invested in AI tools. The adoption gap that follows is predictable — and now preventable.

subject_lines: You described a workflow. AgentHub built it.
That enrollment backlog you've been putting off — AgentHub handles it tonight.
Zero code. First agent live today.
ld_program_manager.hook: If you can describe what you want done, AgentHub can build the agent that does it. No IT ticket. No developer. Just your workflow, running on its own.

tech_signals: Existing Docebo LMS customer (required — expansion motion only)
Confluence or SharePoint in use (agent connector readiness)
Slack or Salesforce in tech stack
exclude: Net-new Docebo prospects — expansion only, no cold acquisition
Organizations on Docebo free trial
SMB under 200 employees

products.name: Docebo Skills Intelligence
products.tagline: Infer skills, spot gaps, and develop talent
products.positioning: Real-time dynamic skills map across the workforce — not a static spreadsheet
products.built_on: Acquisition of 365Talents, AI-driven skills intelligence platform
proof_points: Detects roles, proficiencies, and inferred skills automatically
Skills gaps trigger targeted learning paths without manual assignment
Updated continuously as employees complete learning and receive manager reviews
products.campaign_motion: expansion — existing Docebo LMS customers only; AI-powered skill gap detection and workforce skills data are not available to net-new prospects

subject_lines: Your skills data is a spreadsheet. It should be a living map.
Skill gaps don't wait for your next review cycle.
What if skill gaps triggered learning paths automatically — without a manual assignment?
vp_ld.hook: Every quarter, the same question: do we know what our people can actually do? Skills Intelligence replaces the guess with a dynamic, continuously updated map — tied directly to learning.

subject_lines: 59% of best-performing organizations integrate skills into L&D. Here's what they know.
Your board wants to know the organization is AI-ready. Here's the data to show them.
Skills data shouldn't live in a spreadsheet. Here's what real-time looks like.
cpo.hook: Best-performing organizations don't guess at workforce readiness. They know which teams have the skills to execute — and which don't. Skills Intelligence makes that visible before it becomes a problem.

tech_signals: Existing Docebo LMS customer (required — expansion only)
Workday or SAP SuccessFactors in HRIS stack (integration readiness signal)
Active use of 365Talents profiles
exclude: Net-new Docebo prospects — expansion only
Organizations without a formal L&D or HR function
SMB under 200 employees

products.name: Docebo Enterprise Knowledge
products.tagline: Get trusted answers right when you need them
products.positioning: AI-powered knowledge search across all enterprise sources — the foundation of the Marketing Brain
proof_points: Searches across Drive, Confluence, SharePoint, Docebo catalog simultaneously
Returns trusted answers not just links
Governance layer ensures content is current and attributed
products.campaign_motion: expansion — existing Docebo LMS customers seeking to connect knowledge across the enterprise into a single trusted search layer

tech_signals: Existing Docebo LMS customer (required — expansion only)
Confluence, SharePoint, or Google Drive as primary knowledge repository
exclude: Net-new Docebo prospects — expansion only
Organizations already using Microsoft 365 Copilot as primary search (potential overlap blocker)

products.name: Docebo Advanced Analytics
products.tagline: Bring learning data into your BI tools
products.positioning: Correlate learning metrics with HR, CRM, and finance data to prove ROI
proof_points: Connects learning completion to retention and performance data
Ready-to-analyze data in your BI tools
Executive-ready dashboards that speak the language of the CFO
products.campaign_motion: expansion — existing Docebo LMS customers who need to prove L&D ROI to finance and the board

tech_signals: Existing Docebo LMS customer (required — expansion only)
Tableau, PowerBI, or Looker in BI stack (readiness to consume learning data)
Salesforce CRM in use
exclude: Net-new Docebo prospects — expansion only
Organizations without a BI infrastructure or data analytics team
SMB under 500 employees

products.name: Docebo Headless Learning
products.tagline: Learning that lives where work actually happens
products.positioning: Inject personalized learning experiences directly into any application or workflow — no context switch, no separate platform
products.key_differentiator: Learning embedded natively into existing tools employees already use — Slack, Salesforce, custom apps — without rebuilding anything
proof_points: Deploy learning inside any existing application without IT rebuilding the stack
Employees learn in the tools they already use daily — zero context switch
L&D teams control the experience without depending on engineering
products.campaign_motion: expansion — existing Docebo LMS customers ready to extend learning beyond the platform

icp.company_size: 1000+ employees with an internal engineering team
tech_signals: Existing Docebo LMS customer (required — expansion only)
Internal portals or custom-built apps (signal: need to embed learning in existing tools)
Salesforce with embedded workflows
exclude: Net-new Docebo prospects — expansion only
Organizations without internal engineering capacity to integrate APIs
Organizations seeking a standalone out-of-the-box LMS experience

products.name: Docebo Roleplay
products.tagline: Practice real skills. Perform with confidence.
products.positioning: AI-powered roleplay simulations that let every employee practice real scenarios, get instant feedback, and build confidence before the moment that matters
products.key_differentiator: Scale scenario-based training without hiring more coaches — AI plays the customer, the objection, the difficult conversation
proof_points: Sales reps practice objection handling unlimited times before a real call
Instant AI feedback after every simulation — no waiting for manager review
Scales coaching to every employee not just top performers
products.campaign_motion: expansion or net-new — strongest fit for sales enablement and customer-facing teams

tech_signals: Salesforce or HubSpot in CRM stack (sales organization signal)
Gong or Chorus in use (signal: sales training is already a priority)
Customer-facing teams of 20+ reps
exclude: Organizations without customer-facing or sales teams
Internal-only L&D teams with no sales enablement mandate

products.name: Docebo Content Creator
products.tagline: Build courses fast. Without the bottleneck.
products.positioning: AI-powered eLearning authoring that turns existing documents, decks, and knowledge into high-quality courses in hours not weeks
products.key_differentiator: No instructional design background required — AI handles course structure, assessment generation, and media planning from source documents
proof_points: Turn a product release note into an interactive course in one afternoon
AI generates outline, assessment, and media plan from any source document
No instructional design expertise required — L&D teams ship faster
products.campaign_motion: expansion or net-new — strongest fit for L&D teams drowning in content backlog

industries: Any — strongest for orgs with large content backlogs and small L&D teams
tech_signals: Confluence, SharePoint, or Google Drive as primary content repository (source documents to convert)
L&D team of 1–3 people managing a large course request queue
Docebo Learn with low course publish rate relative to content requests
exclude: Organizations with a dedicated instructional design team wanting full authoring control
Organizations that purchase off-the-shelf content only and never create custom courses

products.name: Docebo Harmony AI
products.tagline: Ask once. Get the right answer.
products.positioning: AI-powered search and discovery across all learning content — learners find exactly what they need without browsing catalogs or filing support tickets
products.key_differentiator: Searches across the entire Docebo content library and enterprise knowledge sources simultaneously — one query, trusted answer
proof_points: Learners find relevant content without browsing catalogs or asking L&D
Reduces support tickets from employees who cannot find training materials
AI understands intent not just keywords — surfaces the right content first time
products.campaign_motion: expansion — existing Docebo customers with large content libraries

industries: Any — strongest for orgs with 100+ active courses in Docebo catalog
tech_signals: Existing Docebo LMS customer with 100+ published courses (required)
High support ticket volume related to learners not finding content
L&D teams spending significant time answering 'where is the training on X?' questions
exclude: New Docebo deployments still building their content library (fewer than 50 active courses)
Organizations buying off-the-shelf content bundles without a custom catalog

competitors.name: Cornerstone OnDemand
competitors.positioning: Legacy enterprise talent management and compliance platform
docebo_wins: More modern UI — significantly easier for admins and learners
Faster implementation — Docebo deploys in months not years
AI is native not bolted on
Better multi-audience support — employees, partners, customers from one platform
docebo_loses: Cornerstone has deeper HRIS integration in some enterprise stacks
Cornerstone has stronger compliance depth for regulated industries
competitors.displacement_message: Cornerstone was built for compliance in the 2000s. Docebo was built for AI-powered learning in 2026.

competitors.name: Sana Labs
competitors.positioning: AI-native learning platform — no legacy LMS constraints
docebo_wins: Docebo has enterprise governance and compliance Sana lacks
Docebo supports multi-audience — employees, partners, customers — Sana is primarily internal
Docebo has 20 years of enterprise learning infrastructure
3900+ customers vs Sana's smaller install base
docebo_loses: Sana is perceived as more AI-native — no legacy baggage
Sana deploys faster for smaller organizations
Sana pricing is more accessible for mid-market
competitors.displacement_message: Sana is fast to deploy but light on governance. Docebo gives you AI-native learning with enterprise-grade control.

competitors.name: TalentLMS
competitors.positioning: Budget-friendly LMS for SMB and mid-market
docebo_wins: Docebo has significantly more advanced AI capabilities
Docebo scales to enterprise — TalentLMS hits a ceiling
Docebo has multi-audience support TalentLMS lacks
docebo_loses: TalentLMS starts free and has public pricing — Docebo starts at $25K+
TalentLMS deploys in days — Docebo takes months
TalentLMS is simpler for organizations that just need basic LMS
competitors.displacement_message: TalentLMS is fine for simple training. When you need AI, scale, and business impact — that's Docebo.

channels.name: HubSpot Email Sequences
channels.use_case: Nurture existing Docebo customers toward upsell — AgentHub, Skills Intelligence expansion
channels.docebo_approach: Plain-text, outcome-led sequences referencing specific pain points from CRM data — not generic newsletters

channels.name: LinkedIn Sponsored Content
channels.use_case: Top-of-funnel awareness among L&D and People leaders at target accounts
channels.docebo_approach: Single-image ads with outcome-led headlines — no feature lists, no product screenshots. Skepticism-aware copy.

channels.name: In-Product Banner and Modal
channels.use_case: Intercept eligible accounts inside the platform at the moment of highest intent
channels.docebo_approach: Two-variant in-app message — passive banner for general eligible accounts, triggered modal for high-activity accounts

channels.name: Live Webinar
channels.use_case: Convert mid-funnel prospects through peer proof — customer story plus live demo
channels.docebo_approach: 45-minute session: 20-min customer story, 15-min live product walkthrough, 10-min Q&A. Always include an early adopter as speaker.

channels.name: Qualified AI Outbound
channels.use_case: AI-powered personalized outbound sequences to target accounts — removes email from BDR plates
channels.docebo_approach: Signal-based outbound — trigger sequences based on in-product behavior, job change signals, or content engagement

channels.name: CSM-Led Expansion Outreach
channels.use_case: Expansion into AgentHub and Skills Intelligence for existing Docebo LMS customers
channels.docebo_approach: CSM introduces new capability in QBR or business review — warm introduction supported by marketing leave-behinds

proof_points.claim: Up to 80% decrease in administrative costs
Bethany Care Society reduced orientation costs by 24% and saved 372 educator hours annually
MidFirst Bank saved thousands in administrative costs through AI automation
85% of employees say training does not help them use AI in their role
59% of best-performing organizations integrate skills into L&D delivery vs 36% of everyone else
79% of employees say learning is not personalized to them
First AgentHub agent deployable in a single afternoon — no IT ticket required
Disguise increased active learners 4x and training revenue 45% with Docebo
96% of organizations see positive returns from customer education programs
Formalized education programs drive 6.2% revenue increase and 7.4% retention boost

marketing_team.demand_generation: Owns email sequences, paid campaigns, demo pipeline, MQL to SQL conversion
marketing_team.product_marketing: Owns positioning, launch campaigns, battle cards, sales enablement, competitive intelligence
marketing_team.content: Blog, thought leadership, case studies, webinar content
marketing_team.paid_social: LinkedIn sponsored content, retargeting, lookalike audiences
marketing_team.customer_success: Expansion, QBR conversations, case study sourcing
marketing_team.customer_marketing: Customer advocacy, case studies, reference programs, customer speakers
marketing_team.field_marketing: Events, webinars, regional programs, Docebo Inspire
marketing_team.marketing_ops: HubSpot workflows, automation, lead routing, campaign reporting
marketing_team.revops: Salesforce, attribution modeling, pipeline reporting, forecast

brand_voice.visual_direction: Neo(n) Renaissance — classical forms, modern color, structure paired with movement
brand_voice.tone: Direct, opinionated, comfortable expressing a point of view. Docebo has a damn opinion.
brand_voice.enemy: Category language — everyone sounds like a leader, everyone has the same opinion. Docebo is not that.
brand_voice.belief: Learning is foundational infrastructure for organizations operating in constantly changing environments
brand_voice.problem_we_solve: Static systems that document work instead of adapting as work keeps changing
brand_voice.kyle_quote: The future belongs to the learners, and to the organizations that treat learning as a living system rather than a static function

company_context.flagship_event: Docebo Inspire — 5,000+ in-person, 15,000 virtual attendees in 2025
company_context.blog_traffic: 1.2M+ organic visits to Learning Insights annually
company_context.digital_budget_share: 35% of marketing budget on digital — LinkedIn and SEO primary
company_context.positioning: Intelligence Layer of the modern enterprise
company_context.learning_philosophy: 70:20:10 — social and experiential learning as USP
company_context.responsible_ai: Introduced 2025 — data privacy, explainable algorithms, governance
company_context.analyst_recognition: Gartner Enterprise LMS Magic Quadrant Leader through 2025

campaign_results.human_centric_ai_2025: 4.5% CTR, 15% upsell revenue lift in 6 months
campaign_results.ai_personalization: 18% longer session duration, 22% better completion rates
